send it on over to Save the Children.<%%>ER:It's a very valuable cause, and afterall, they have won up to 7 awards.<%%>EE:Oh, that is nice!<%%>EE:Especially now with so many children separated from their families because of the immigration disputes, I hope they can help children here even in America as well!<%%>ER:They absolutely have United States based programs!<%%>ER:From Avocacy, to Education, and even emergency services.<%%>ER:I worry about those kids too, so I understand.<%%>ER:It's a shame what's going on, I hope the problem gets rectified soon.<%%>EE:Me too.<%%>EE:I think about them so often.<%%>EE:I have a sister who is under eighteen.<%%>EE:I try to teach her about her rights because I think it is so important to know them.<%%>EE:If someone believes they can take advantage of your ignorance, a lot of times, they will.<%%>EE:It's a shame, but I want her to know her rights so that she is never taken advantage of by someone in a higher position of power.<%%>EE:Wherever and whoever that may be.<%%>ER:I want to teach my daughter the same someday!<%%>ER:It's even harder seeing the things going on here on the news and in the media when you have a child that's so close to you :(<%%>ER:Yes.<%%>EE:It makes me scared for her and my nephews as well.<%%>EE:I hope we can fix the bad in the world by the time they grow older.<%%>EE:have noticed so many kids that are kinder and more aware than when I was younger.<%%>EE:I think it's because there are more people who have experienced injustice or have been hurt by inequality.<%%>EE:They want to make sure it doesn't happen to the ones that come after us.<%%>ER:I agree!<%%>ER:I think that the internet helps, too.<%%>ER:Helps to bring awareness.<%%>ER:It was very kind of you, today, to donate your earnings from this chat for the kids.<%%>ER:I understand the grind of trying to make a buck, and I just wanted to leave you off with one thing: you heard about saving children and you committed.<%%>ER:That's so big of you, and not many people care these days.<%%>ER:I admire you, and I hope you have a wonderful day. :)<%%>EE:Thank you.<%%>EE:It was nice speaking with you! :)<%%>ER:You as well!<%%>ER:xx
